title: (第一年) BBC: 香港運動 - 5個引爆點

replies.msg:
https://www.bbc.com/news/world-asia-china-53942295

Hong Kong protests: The flashpoints in a year of anger

Hong Kongers have been remembering key events from the months of anti-government protests that overwhelmed the city last year as democracy activists accuse authorities of trying to rewrite history.
「香港人一直紀念上年反送中示威嘅重要事件，指政府正嘗試改變歷史」

(key 嘅字面解「鎖匙」，用黎開門好「緊要」，可以記住Key可以解作「最重要」、「好緊要」嘅人事物。同義詞有important (小學雞), crucial, decisive, critical，下面都會見到DSE仔女加油)

12 June 2019: The first tear gas and rubber bullets
2019年6月12日: 無盡催淚彈與橡膠子彈之始

//"It was an important turning point for the movement,"..."There was a sense that justice has to be served and police have to be held to account."//
「(612)係運動重要嘅轉捩點...社會認為必須要伸張正義，警察要對市民負責。」

1 July 2019: The storming of parliament
2019年7月1日: 衝擊立法會破除制度幻想

//This day is viewed by many as transforming a protest against an extradition bill into a much wider movement for democracy.//
「呢一日被視為將運動由反送中演化成更大願景嘅民主運動。」

21 July 2019: White shirted 'triads' attack public in train station
2019年7月21日: 白衣三合會無差別攻擊市民
(Triad 「三合會」同普通流氓(mob, thug)唔同，係有歷史，有組織同目的嘅犯罪組織，點解BBC要用triad大家自己諗下)

//The violence, which left dozens of protesters and bystanders injured, marked a critical turning point in how many of the public viewed the police, who were late to arrive at the scene.//
「呢場襲擊令好多抗爭者同無辜市民受傷，係市民大眾對警察觀感轉差嘅關鍵轉捩點，尤其係佢地太遲到達案發現場。」

31 August 2019: The 831 incident
2019年8月31日: 831事件永留港人心坎

//But the events of that night remain seared in the minds of many Hong Kongers with ongoing tributes to those injured through artwork and flowers left outside the station.//
「個一晚嘅襲擊仍然喺香港人心入面留低揮之不去嘅陰霾，繼續為死傷者獻上藝術同鮮花悼念。」

17 November 2019: The university siege
2019年11月17日: 全城奮起勇解大學之圍

//Intense battles broke out between protesters and the police after the latter sealed off the campus. The air was thick smoke as officers deployed tear and rubber bullets. Protesters fought back with catapults, Molotov cocktails and bows and arrows.//
「警察封鎖校園成圍城之勢，同抗爭者展開激烈戰鬥。硝煙漫天，槍聲連連，石弩盡發，火瓶弓箭劃破長夜晚空」

香港人，記住
孫某要求各位DSE仔女努力讀書，多睇英文
孫將軍推
推
孫立人將軍勉勵大家努力讀書

香港人，記住

(Triad 「三合會」同普通流氓(mob, thug)唔同，係有歷史，有組織同目的嘅犯罪組織，點解BBC要用triad大家自己諗下)

//The violence, which left dozens of protesters and bystanders injured, marked a critical turning point in how many of the public viewed the police, who were late to arrive at the scene.//
「呢場襲擊令好多抗爭者同無辜市民受傷，係市民大眾對警察觀感轉差嘅關鍵轉捩點，尤其係佢地太遲到達案發現場。」

31 August 2019: The 831 incident
2019年8月31日: 831事件永留港人心坎

//But the events of that night remain seared in the minds of many Hong Kongers with ongoing tributes to those injured through artwork and flowers left outside the station.//
「個一晚嘅襲擊仍然喺香港人心入面留低揮之不去嘅陰霾，繼續為死傷者獻上藝術同鮮花悼念。」

17 November 2019: The university siege
2019年11月17日: 全城奮起勇解大學之圍

//Intense battles broke out between protesters and the police after the latter sealed off the campus. The air was thick smoke as officers deployed tear and rubber bullets. Protesters fought back with catapults, Molotov cocktails and bows and arrows.//
「警察封鎖校園成圍城之勢，同抗爭者展開激烈戰鬥。硝煙漫天，槍聲連連，石弩盡發，火瓶弓箭劃破長夜晚空」

香港人，記住

quote.msg:
https://www.bbc.com/news/world-asia-china-53942295

Hong Kong protests: The flashpoints in a year of anger

Hong Kongers have been remembering key events from the months of anti-government protests that overwhelmed the city last year as democracy activists accuse authorities of trying to rewrite history.
「香港人一直紀念上年反送中示威嘅重要事件，指政府正嘗試改變歷史」

(key 嘅字面解「鎖匙」，用黎開門好「緊要」，可以記住Key可以解作「最重要」、「好緊要」嘅人事物。同義詞有important (小學雞), crucial, decisive, critical，下面都會見到DSE仔女加油)

12 June 2019: The first tear gas and rubber bullets
